title: Discrepancy in monthly overtime (OT) hours payment in June payslip
description: I reviewed my payslip for June and noticed that my approved overtime hours from the system deployment on June 15th (totaling 8 hours at double rate) were not paid. My manager approved the hours, but they seem to be missing.
triage_reason_summary: Overtime calculations and payslip corrections are handled by HR001 Compensation & Benefits.
triage_recommended_next_action: Cross-reference the employee OT logs, verify manager approval, and process the adjustment in the next payroll cycle.

title: Query regarding annual leave balance correction after system migration
description: My annual leave balance in the self-service portal is showing only 8 days remaining, but according to my records and last month payslip, I should have 12 days. I suspect the recent HRIS migration did not import my carry-over leave.
triage_reason_summary: Leave balances and system data integrity errors fall under the HR001 C&B team.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check the historical leave tracker backups, correct the balance in the database, and notify the employee.

title: Maternity leave benefit insurance process and allowance query
description: I will be starting my maternity leave next month. I need HR to explain the process for submitting my documents to the social insurance office (BHXH) to receive my maternity allowance, and what the estimated payment timeline is.
triage_reason_summary: Social insurance benefits (BHXH) and maternity claims processing is managed by HR001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Send the maternity benefit document checklist to the employee, and coordinate the submission to the BHXH office.

title: Question regarding Bao Viet Health Insurance coverage limits for dental
description: I need to get a dental crown next week and want to verify if our corporate Bao Viet health insurance covers this procedure. I checked the handbook but couldn't find the specific coverage limits for dental crowns.
triage_reason_summary: Corporate health insurance coverage details are handled by HR001 C&B benefits specialists.
triage_recommended_next_action: Retrieve the employee PVI/Bao Viet benefits booklet, check dental coverage terms, and reply to the employee.

title: Dependent tax deduction registration form submission
description: I recently had a baby and need to register my child as a dependent for personal income tax deduction. I have filled out the registration form and attached the birth certificate. Please update my tax profile.
triage_reason_summary: Personal income tax (PIT) dependent registrations and database updates fall under HR001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Review the birth certificate document, submit the dependent registry to the tax department, and update the payroll database.

title: Salary payment not received on bank account today
description: Today is our monthly salary disbursement day and all my colleagues have received their payments, but my account has not been credited. I checked my bank details in the portal and they look correct. Please check.
triage_reason_summary: Missing salary payments require immediate payroll audit and resolution under HR001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check the bank transfer batch log for the employee ID, verify transaction status, and process immediate wire if failed.

title: Requesting income verification letter for bank loan application
description: I am applying for a bank loan and need a signed income verification letter showing my job title, start date, and monthly salary for the past 3 months. The bank needs this document by next Thursday.
triage_reason_summary: Employment and income verification letters are drafted by HR001 C&B.
triage_recommended_next_action: Draft the verification letter using the corporate template, secure the director's signature, and notify the employee.

title: Updating bank account details for monthly salary payroll
description: I have closed my old bank account and opened a new one with Techcombank. I need HR to update my payroll details to the new account number for all future salary transfers. I have attached the bank confirmation letter.
triage_reason_summary: Bank detail modifications in the payroll system are managed by HR001 C&B.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify bank confirmation documents, update the account number in the payroll software, and test file export.

title: Query about company wellness allowance reimbursement limits
description: I purchased a annual gym membership last month and want to submit the invoice for our wellness allowance reimbursement. I need to check what the annual limit is and if the invoice formatting is compliant.
triage_reason_summary: Wellness allowances and reimbursement guidelines are answered by HR001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Confirm the wellness allowance policy limits, check invoice compliance, and process the reimbursement claim.

title: Meal allowance card not receiving monthly balance
description: My corporate lunch card has not been topped up with the monthly allowance balance for July. I tried scanning it at the cafeteria today but it showed zero balance. Can you check my card status?
triage_reason_summary: Employee benefit cards and meal allowance tops are managed under HR001 benefits.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check the allowance top-up registry for the card number, and contact the lunch vendor to reissue the credit.

title: 13th month salary calculation policy query for mid-year hires
description: I joined the company in April this year and want to understand how my 13th month salary will be calculated at the end of the year. Will it be prorated based on my active months or do I get the full amount?
triage_reason_summary: Year-end bonuses and calculation formulas are explained by HR001 C&B.
triage_recommended_next_action: Explain the prorated 13th-month salary policy to the employee based on their start date.

title: Social insurance book (So BHXH) collection query after transfer
description: I recently transferred to this branch from our local subsidiary. I need to collect my physical social insurance book to complete my profile. Has the book been received from the subsidiary's HR team yet?
triage_reason_summary: Social insurance book tracking and BHXH transfers are handled by HR001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Contact the subsidiary HR team to verify transfer status, and notify the employee when the book is in our storage.

title: PVI health insurance card replacement request after loss
description: I lost my physical PVI health insurance card during my house move. I need to visit the hospital next week and require a replacement card. Can you request a duplicate card from the provider?
triage_reason_summary: Health insurance card replacements and provider requests are managed by HR001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Contact the PVI insurance representative to request a card reissue, and provide the digital insurance number.

title: Retirement pension contribution discrepancy in monthly deductions
description: I noticed in my pay slip that the pension fund contribution deduction has increased by 2% this month. I did not request any changes to my contribution rate. Can you explain why this adjustment was made?
triage_reason_summary: Pension plans and pay slip deductions checks are handled by HR001 C&B.
triage_recommended_next_action: Inspect the payroll configuration, check for any statutory pension rate updates, and reply to the employee.

title: Relocation allowance reimbursement request for regional transfer
description: Following my transfer from Hanoi to the Ho Chi Minh branch last month, I request the payout of my approved relocation allowance. I have attached all moving invoices and rent agreements.
triage_reason_summary: Relocation benefits and transfer payouts are processed under HR001 C&B.
triage_recommended_next_action: Review the relocation policy limits, approve the submitted invoices, and include the allowance in the next payroll run.

title: Retroactive pay adjustment missing for mid-year promotion
description: My promotion to Senior Architect was approved on May 1st, but my June payslip still shows my old salary grade. I was told the difference would be paid retroactively. Can you verify when this will be resolved?
triage_reason_summary: Promotion grade updates and retroactive payroll calculations are handled by HR001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Update the employee salary grade in the system, compute the retroactive pay difference, and include it in next month payroll.

title: Tax code change application after marriage status change
description: I recently registered my marriage and need to update my personal income tax code in the tax office database. I need HR to help register this change so my tax withholding is computed correctly.
triage_reason_summary: PIT tax status updates and government registrations are managed under HR001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Obtain the marriage certificate, register the status change with the tax authority, and update HRIS.

title: Corporate phone allowance not appearing in July payslip
description: My mobile phone allowance of 500,000 VND is missing from my July payslip. I am in the sales team and this allowance is part of my contract. Please check if this was omitted by mistake.
triage_reason_summary: Contractual allowances and payslip item validation is handled by HR001 C&B.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify the contract allowance terms, and add the missing phone allowance item to the payroll system.

title: Emergency salary advance request for family medical emergency
description: Due to an unexpected medical emergency in my family, I need to request an advance of 50% of my monthly salary. My manager has approved the emergency request. I need this processed as soon as possible.
triage_reason_summary: Emergency salary advance requests require fast review and payroll approval under HR001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Obtain director approval for the emergency advance, configure the payroll deduction, and trigger the wire transfer.

title: Duplicate payslip reissuance request for past year visa application
description: I am applying for a foreign visa and need physical signed copies of my payslips from the past 12 months. The self-service portal only allows downloading the last 3 months. Can HR print and stamp these for me?
triage_reason_summary: Historical payslip retrieval and physical stamps are handled by HR001 C&B.
triage_recommended_next_action: Retrieve the 12-month payslip files from the payroll archives, print them, apply the corporate stamp, and notify the employee.

title: Childcare subsidy application submission and policy question
description: I want to apply for the corporate childcare subsidy for my 3-year-old child starting preschool next month. I need to know what documents are required and if there are specific approved schools.
triage_reason_summary: Childcare benefits and eligibility checks are managed under HR001 benefits.
triage_recommended_next_action: Send the childcare subsidy policy documents and application form link to the employee.

title: Housing allowance documentation validation for expat staff
description: I am an expatriate developer and need to submit my monthly lease invoice to activate my tax-exempt housing allowance. Can you verify if the red invoice details match our corporate tax code?
triage_reason_summary: Expat housing benefits and tax invoice validation is processed under HR001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify the lease invoice against company tax compliance guidelines, and approve the allowance mapping.

title: Fitness benefit reimbursement invoice rejection explanation
description: My gym invoice submission for the fitness benefit was rejected with the status 'Invalid document'. I paid using my personal credit card and attached the receipt. Can you clarify what is missing?
triage_reason_summary: Reimbursement compliance checks and queries are handled by HR001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Review the rejected invoice details, explain to the user that a formal red invoice (e-invoice) is required, and invite resubmission.

title: Inquiry about overtime pay rate for working on public holidays
description: We are planning to support our server infrastructure during the upcoming national holiday. I need HR to confirm if the overtime pay rate for working on public holidays is 300% of the base salary and how to submit the hours.
triage_reason_summary: Holiday overtime pay rates and payroll compliance questions are answered by HR001 C&B.
triage_recommended_next_action: Provide the statutory holiday pay rate details to the employee and guide them on the OT approval flow in HRIS.

title: Retroactive shift differential allowance missing for night shift engineers
description: Our team has been working on the night support shifts (10 PM to 6 AM) for the past two months. The contract specifies a 30% shift differential, but our payslips only show the base rate. We request a retroactive correction.
triage_reason_summary: Shift differential allowances and retrospective pay calculations are handled by HR001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Audit the night shift attendance logs, calculate the differential difference, and process the payout in next month's payroll.

title: Requesting update to bank details for international wire transfer
description: I need to update my bank account details in the HR system to an international Citibank account for my expat salary wire. I have attached the routing number and SWIFT code bank documentation.
triage_reason_summary: Expatriate banking details updates and SWIFT codes config are processed under HR001 payroll.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify SWIFT codes with the corporate bank portal, and update the foreign transaction details in the payroll DB.

title: PIT tax deduction certificate request for personal income tax finalization
description: I am preparing my personal tax finalization for the past calendar year and need HR to issue my official Personal Income Tax (PIT) deduction certificate (Chung tu khau tru thue TNCN). I need it by next week.
triage_reason_summary: PIT tax deduction certificates and annual tax finalization support is managed under HR001 C&B.
triage_recommended_next_action: Print the official tax deduction certificate, sign and stamp it, and notify the employee for physical collection.

title: Leave carry-over policy query for unused annual leave
description: I have 5 days of unused annual leave from last year. The manager said they can be carried over, but I want to clarify if there is an expiration date for utilizing these carried-over days before they are forfeited.
triage_reason_summary: Leave policies, carry-over terms, and expiration details are answered by HR001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Explain the annual leave carry-over expiration policy (e.g., must use by March 31st) to the employee.

title: Question regarding Bao Viet health insurance card addition for dependents
description: I want to register my parents under our corporate Bao Viet health insurance policy as dependents. I need HR to clarify the premium cost that will be deducted from my salary and how to submit the medical declaration.
triage_reason_summary: Dependent health insurance additions and payroll premium deductions are managed by HR001 benefits.
triage_recommended_next_action: Send the dependent insurance premium pricing list and registration form link to the employee.

title: Discrepancy in monthly travel allowance calculation
description: My travel allowance for field audits last month was calculated as 1,200,000 VND, but based on my approved travel tickets and mileage tracker, it should be 1,800,000 VND. Please verify the calculation.
triage_reason_summary: Travel and business expense allowances audit is handled by HR001 C&B.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify the travel tickets against the expense sheets, and correct the travel allowance credit for the employee.

title: Query about stock option vesting schedule and taxation rules
description: My first batch of ESOP stock options is vesting next month. I need HR to explain the exercise process, whether the options are sold automatically, and what PIT tax rates will apply to the capital gains.
triage_reason_summary: Stock options, ESOP vesting, and capital gains tax calculations are explained by HR001.
triage_recommended_next_action: Send the ESOP guide and the current capital gains PIT tax policy rules to the employee.

title: Relocation expenses reimbursement claim status check
description: I submitted my moving invoices for my relocation from Da Nang to the main office three weeks ago, but the claim status in the portal is still showing 'Pending Approval'. Can someone check if additional info is needed?
triage_reason_summary: Reimbursement claims tracking and validation falls under HR001 C&B operations.
triage_recommended_next_action: Inspect the relocation invoice approvals, contact the finance team, and update the status in the portal.

title: Housing allowance application process for relocated domestic employees
description: I was transferred from the Hanoi office to the HCM branch to lead the new project. Does the company offer a housing allowance for relocated domestic staff, and what is the application process?
triage_reason_summary: Domestic housing allowances and domestic transfer policy falls under HR001.
